Quality Control Centre

Stuck = stalled in Requested / Agreed / Submitted states for > 24h. Extracted = research on disk (done). Generated 29-Jun-26 05:06 UTC.
← back to dashboard
Research Report Progress
Standalone view →Updated 29 Jun 2026, 08:30 (UK time)

Live status of every research report being produced automatically. Each report is requested, sent to AlphaSense, downloaded, highlighted, and published to the website.

Being worked on now: 143Waiting in queue: 242AlphaSense capacity: 39 of 3Finished in last 7 days: 374Stuck: 143Problems: 36
Needs attentionWhat do I do? ▾
🟢 Green — no action needed; Watson is handling it.
🟡 Yellow — Watson is retrying automatically; check back in 2–4 hours.
🔴 Red — needs a look; message CoS or check the pipeline log.

    Infineon (IFX-DE) — Risks

    Red — needs attention
    Problem
    Stuck at "Putting it on the website" for 39.2 hours with no progress.

Deep Research reports submit first, three at a time. Think Longer reports submit one at a time only when no Deep Research work is waiting (per the batching SOP), so they can sit here a long time. This is expected, not stuck.

All dates and times are shown in UK time. Report links open in a new window. Repository links filter to that stock.
32 pipeline problems · 0 in progress · 0 published in last 24h · 15 published this week
Live status (recently published, open problems, recent activity) is shown in the “Research Report Progress” panel at the top of this page. The older summary boxes here were retired on 05-Jun-26 because they read a data source the current pipeline no longer updates.

Build Notes

manual entries · dashboard meta-events
16-May-26 08:30 UK
RDS subgroup + 6 other dashboard changes
Added Recent Developments Summariser (RDS) subgroup to RESEARCH REPORTS — 3 columns / 6 cells. Expanded Any Stage from 4 cells (1 blank) to 6 active cells. Swapped Stage and Cohort(s) column order; default-hide Industry/Sector + Cohort + Stage with a Show meta columns toggle. Added top QC bar (Last updated stamp + issue chips), Changelog history button, and made per-cell dates more prominent (10px, bright). Shipped live to https://vfhqi.github.io/repository/ at commit 98cadac (preview push cecc45d, RR-prefix label fix 3b65737, root push 98cadac).
  • 16 surgical edits to gen_html.py — every anchor validated for uniqueness + presence
  • 5 surgical edits to build_functional.py — adds RDS folder scanning (Files/{T}/Developments/*-RDS) + Q25/26/27 placeholders + QC meta
  • RDS data: 15 stocks already have RDS reports (1 each, dated 2026-05-15) — populate cell 1 of the new subgroup
  • Chrome live audit (SA Pre-Ship Discipline §2 12-step gate) executed before publish
  • Pre-build snapshot at snapshots/2026-05-16-pre-summariserbuild/; .bak-pre-summariserbuild-20260516-074800 backups on every edited file
  • Live at commit 98cadac on https://vfhqi.github.io/repository/ — Chrome live audit passed: 6 clean RDS labels, no double-R prefix, 378 populated report cells, QC bar with universe.json fallback chip
16-May-26 08:00 UK
GitHub Pages publish + twice-daily refresh
Published the 15-May Phase 4-5 A&J Memo Viewer build to https://vfhqi.github.io/repository/ (commit 25fab24). Windows Task Scheduler trigger changed from single 04:34 daily to 06:00 UK + 12:30 UK twice-daily; manual run verified clean.
  • 15-May FUSE-truncation panic resolved by overnight rebuild — 309,352-byte clean artefact, closing </html>, byte-identical local + deploy
  • Manual TS run at 06:01:57 UTC: ALL 5 STEPS OK in 4.6s
  • Cowork fallback task updated; cron set to 06:00 (cron can't express two different minutes — 12:30 lives in Windows TS only)

Closed out three same-named reports-memos-repository.html files across COWORK. Canonical = PROJECTS/SA - Reports & Memos Repository/reports-memos-repository.html; superseded copies tagged with _SUPERSEDED-*.md signposts. All MANIFEST / spec / state / decisions / log pointers corrected.

15-May-26 05:00 UK
A&J Memo Viewer build — Phase 4-5 complete
All 5 phases of the A&J Memo Viewer build done end-to-end. scan_memos.py = disk-grounded SoT for memo lifecycle; build_functional consumes real state objects; gen_html renders the 6-state lifecycle wash + label + date + click-through. Daily refresh wrapper (refresh_repository.py) wired.
  • Chrome live audit passed: 15 memo quads render correct Published wash + click-through tested
  • Full-geographic-ticker bleed-stop applied (EKTA-B-SE not EKTA-B, etc.)
  • Phase 6 'Watson briefing' dropped — IA SOPs are the briefing

14-May-26 09:30 UK

Repository dashboard mechanics shipped + 4 rounds of Richard review fixes. Live at https://vfhqi.github.io/repository/ on vfhqi/repository, main branch root.

  • No console errors; renders identically to local
  • Deploy artefact = deploy-repository/index.html + .nojekyll; refresh.py does not git-push (deliberate human step)
